title: Cinematic Silhouette Narrative Poster AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Silhouette Narrative Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Collector-edition cinematic narrative poster inspired by Dream of the Red Chamber, built around towering elegant side-profile silhouette of Lin Daiyu and Grand View Garden scenes, poetic meetings, family relationships, garden architecture, stone paths, silk interiors, and drifting petals. Subject: towering elegant side-profile silhouette of Lin Daiyu forms the towering elegant side-profile outer boundary; the portrait silhouette remains restrained, poetic, and emotionally central rather than a standard character collage. Scene: Grand View Garden scenes, poetic meetings, family relationships, garden architecture, stone paths, silk interiors, and drifting petals organically emerges inside the silhouette with layered spatial depth, iconic architecture, symbolic relationships, props, motifs, and fate-heavy Eastern atmosphere. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: falling flowers, poetry manuscripts, delicate silk, jade-like cool light, mist, and fate-heavy Eastern melancholy anchor the literary identity while the world of the novel grows naturally within the silhouette boundary. Style: Film-poster style meets Eastern realism, real physical light behavior, cinematic framing, layered depth, subtle film grain, real material texture, and premium collector-edition finish. Color Palette: Fixed restrained Eastern cinematic palette with cool ink shadows, warm accent light, muted jade, aged silk cream, faded rose, stone grey, and soft mist transitions. Lighting: Cinematic side-backlight with warm accent points, controlled cool-warm contrast, volumetric rays, soft mist, atmospheric perspective, and calm high-end drama. Camera: Vertical cinematic poster framing with a towering side-profile silhouette, deep internal miniature scenes, focus-controlled layers, and vast quiet negative space. Materials: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Cinematic Silhouette Narrative Poster Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Collector-edition cinematic narrative poster inspired by Dream of the Red Chamber, built around refined side-profile silhouette of Lin Daiyu with quiet sorrow and elegant posture and miniature pavilions, moonlit garden corridors, chamber lanterns, symbolic meetings, water stones, and layered family-drama vignettes. Subject: refined side-profile silhouette of Lin Daiyu with quiet sorrow and elegant posture forms the towering elegant side-profile outer boundary; the portrait silhouette remains restrained, poetic, and emotionally central rather than a standard character collage. Scene: miniature pavilions, moonlit garden corridors, chamber lanterns, symbolic meetings, water stones, and layered family-drama vignettes organically emerges inside the silhouette with layered spatial depth, iconic architecture, symbolic relationships, props, motifs, and fate-heavy Eastern atmosphere. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: soft mist, red petals, silk sleeves, ancient books, stone railings, warm lantern points, and cool jade shadows anchor the literary identity while the world of the novel grows naturally within the silhouette boundary. Style: Film-poster style meets Eastern realism, real physical light behavior, cinematic framing, layered depth, subtle film grain, real material texture, and premium collector-edition finish. Color Palette: Fixed restrained Eastern cinematic palette with cool ink shadows, warm accent light, muted jade, aged silk cream, faded rose, stone grey, and soft mist transitions. Lighting: Cinematic side-backlight with warm accent points, controlled cool-warm contrast, volumetric rays, soft mist, atmospheric perspective, and calm high-end drama. Camera: Vertical cinematic poster framing with a towering side-profile silhouette, deep internal miniature scenes, focus-controlled layers, and vast quiet negative space. Materials: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
